response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack development experience with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and React. They have worked on projects that involve complex systems and integrations, demonstrating their ability to handle the responsibilities of the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with relevant technologies
Proven ability to work on complex projects and integrations
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: Some mismatch in the primary stack, as they have used Ember.js more frequently than React
No explicit mention of experience with Vitest, though they have testing experience

key_factors.factor: Slight mismatch in frontend framework experience
